title: alcantarea heloisae
intro: Alcantarea heloisae, also known as the red torch bromeliad, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable resource for herbal remedies. Alcantarea heloisae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and support overall well-being.
